title: IOPreprocessEnabled Property
description:
Set whether to operate the output bit when starting the force guide object.

Values

False : Normal

True : When operating the output bit such as operating/aborting peripherals.
notes:
You can operate only one output bit.

To operate several output bit, use SPELFunc object.

See Also: IOPreprocessEnabled Property

RobotNumber Property
see_also:
Applies To

Contact Object, Relax Object
